subcodes.first_line: O essence of the wise ones, true Physician and spiritual Sage, the Ancient Beauty - may my spirit be a sacrifice unto His supreme remedy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قوام الحکما طبیب حقیقی و حکیم معنوی جمال قدم روحی لدریاقه الاعظم ‌الفدا بود
subcodes.subjects: @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
